case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ROSA KARINA GAMBOA VALDEZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,010.63 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, ROSA KARINA GAMBOA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, ROSA KARINA GAMBOA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALDEZ, ROSA KARINA GAMBOA $1,010.63 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.63, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED DEFENDANT'S LOAN DELINQUENCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
